message: 🌱 Add opentofu: Direct support for conditional single-instance resources mission (#701)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,76 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "opentofu-1306-direct-support-for-conditional-single-instance-resources",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "opentofu: Direct support for conditional single-instance resources",
+    "description": "Direct support for conditional single-instance resources. Requested by 139+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current opentofu deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your opentofu version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n opentofu -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentofu\nhelm list -n opentofu 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working opentofu installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review opentofu configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant opentofu configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n opentofu -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentofu\nkubectl get configmap -n opentofu -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=opentofu\n```\n### OpenTofu Version\n\n```shell\nNone. Currently using Hashicorp Terraform.\n```\n\n### Use Cases\n\nWe often use `count = var.xxxx ? 1 : 0` in various flavours but with the same purpose of determining to create or not create a single resource."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Direct support for conditional single-instance resources",
+        "description": "This is just a basic prototype of supporting a configuration like the following:\n\n```hcl\nterraform {\n  # The \"enabled\" argument currently requires opting in to this experiment,\n  # because adding a new meta-argument is a breaking change and we've\n  # not yet decided how to handle that.\n \n```yaml\nresource \"aws_key_pair\" \"my-key-pair\" {\n  ...\n  opentofu-options {\n    resource-enabled = var.create-key-pair\n  }\n}\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n opentofu -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentofu\nkubectl get events -n opentofu --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Direct support for conditional single-instance resources\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "This is just a basic prototype of supporting a configuration like the following:\n\n```hcl\nterraform {\n  # The \"enabled\" argument currently requires opting in to this experiment,\n  # because adding a new meta-argument is a breaking change and we've\n  # not yet decided how to handle that.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "resource \"aws_key_pair\" \"my-key-pair\" {\n  ...\n  opentofu-options {\n    resource-enabled = var.create-key-pair\n  }\n}",
+        "or, if you prefer, equivalently:"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "opentofu",
+      "sandbox",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "opentofu"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "advanced",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "sandbox",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/opentofu/opentofu/issues/1306",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/opentofu/opentofu",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/opentofu/opentofu/pull/2299"
+    },
+    "reactions": 139,
+    "comments": 19,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with opentofu installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
